moments.title: World Cup Semifinals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches its penultimate stage with the semifinals featuring France vs Spain and Argentina vs England on July 14th and 15th, ahead of the final on July 19th.

angles.name: England Hopes
angles.copy: England in a World Cup semi-final? You love to see it! Will the Three Lions roar into the final this week?

angles.name: Global Showdown
angles.copy: France, Spain, Argentina, England – who lifts the World Cup trophy this Sunday? The semi-finals are here!

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's final men's major of 2026, begins its tournament days from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Major Golf
angles.copy: It's Claret Jug time! The Open Championship gets underway at Royal Birkdale this Thursday. Who's your pick for glory?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale hosts the 154th Open Championship this week. Expect drama, incredible shots, and maybe a few surprises.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi, takes place at Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26.

angles.name: Latitude Buzz
angles.copy: Pink sheep incoming! Latitude Festival is just days away. Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big One
angles.copy: Suffolk is gearing up for Latitude! David Byrne, Lewis Capaldi, Teddy Swims and more are heading to Henham Park this week.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Hits Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's biggest music event, Splendour Festival, returns to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park from July 18-19, featuring five stages of diverse music.

angles.name: Nottingham's Festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival brings the noise to Nottingham this weekend! Who's ready for two days of music at Wollaton Hall?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, a celebration of Celtic, folk, and traditional music, takes place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland from July 15-18.

angles.name: Celtic Sounds
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off this Wednesday! Get ready for four days of incredible music in Stornoway.

moments.title: 'Rein Me In' Makes Chart History
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds at #1 on the Official Singles Chart (week ending July 16, 2026), becoming the longest-running UK number-one single by a British act with 16 non-consecutive weeks.

angles.name: Chart Record Breaker
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is officially the longest-running British #1 single ever. What a tune!

angles.name: Sam & Olivia Reign
angles.copy: 16 weeks at #1 for Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is still dominating the UK Singles Chart. Are you still playing it on repeat?

moments.title: New Thriller 'The Dark' on ITV
moments.blurb: The moody thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premiered on ITV and ITVX on July 12, exploring a serial killer in the Scottish wilderness.

angles.name: Scottish Thriller
angles.copy: Chills in the Highlands! New thriller 'The Dark' just dropped on ITVX, set in the stunning (and spooky) Scottish wilderness. Binge-watching plans, anyone?

moments.title: Anya Taylor-Joy in 'Lucky'
moments.blurb: Anya Taylor-Joy stars in 'Lucky', a new drama blending suspense and crime as a reformed criminal is forced into one last job, premiering on Apple TV+ on July 15.

angles.name: Anya's New Role
angles.copy: Get ready for some high-stakes drama! Anya Taylor-Joy's new series 'Lucky' hits Apple TV+ this Wednesday. Who's watching?

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in 'Ann Droid', a quirky new BBC comedy about a grieving widow and her socially awkward eldercare robot, which premiered on July 11.

angles.name: Comedy Gold
angles.copy: Diane Morgan + robot sidekick = comedy gold! Her new BBC series 'Ann Droid' is out now. Have you tuned in yet?

moments.title: Luke Hemmings Turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Happy 30th Luke
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 30th Birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer frontman, Luke Hemmings! What's your favourite 5SOS track?

moments.title: Ed Kowalczyk is 55
moments.blurb: Ed Kowalczyk, the lead singer of the rock band Live, celebrates his 55th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Live Legend
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to Ed Kowalczyk, the powerful voice of Live! 'I Alone' or 'Lightning Crashes' – which is your anthem?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, legendary drummer for The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to The Police's drumming maestro, Stewart Copeland! His beats are still iconic. What's your favourite Police song?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK begin their summer holidays this week, with some starting as early as July 20th or 23rd, marking the official start of the long break.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The school gates are closing for summer for many this week! Long holidays, here we come! What are your plans?

angles.name: Local School Break
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many local schools are breaking up this week. Have a fantastic, fun-filled summer holiday!
